summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dashboard Extensions (Services + Social Media) and AI Advisor features. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified ServicesManagement, SocialMediaManagement components, and AI Advisor lock/unlock states work correctly.

backend: test_create_service - Services CRUD: Create service with pricing
test_get_my_services - Services CRUD: Get barber's services list
test_update_service - Services CRUD: Update existing service
test_delete_service - Services CRUD: Delete service and verify removal
test_update_social_media_all_platforms - Social Media: Save all 8 platforms (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube, Twitter, Snapchat, WhatsApp, Website)
test_update_partial_social_media - Social Media: Partial update works
test_social_media_persists_in_profile - Social Media: Data persists in barber profile
test_eligibility_locked_without_booking - AI Advisor: LOCKED for user without booking
test_eligibility_unlocked_after_confirmed_booking - AI Advisor: UNLOCKED after confirmed booking
test_duplicate_analysis_returns_409 - AI Advisor: Cache mechanism (409 on duplicate)
test_whatsapp_share_endpoint_exists - AI Advisor: WhatsApp share endpoint exists
test_whatsapp_share_returns_valid_link - AI Advisor: Returns 404 for non-existent advice
test_my_advice_returns_list - AI Advisor: my-advice endpoint returns list
frontend: Gender selection page loads with cinematic 50/50 split
Barber Dashboard loads with stats, QR code, products, services, social media sections
ServicesManagement component renders with Add Service button and form
Service form has all fields: Name (EN), Name (AR), Description, Price, Duration, Category
SocialMediaManagement component renders with all 8 platforms
Social media data displays correctly (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube, Twitter, Snapchat, WhatsApp, Website)
Save Accounts button works and shows success toast
AI Advisor page shows LOCKED state for user without booking
AI Advisor shows lock icon, 'Feature Locked' message, 'Book an appointment' button
AI Advisor page shows UNLOCKED state for user with confirmed booking
AI Advisor shows upload form, 'Start AI Analysis' button, 'Powered by GPT-5 Vision'

seed_data_creation: Test services and social media data created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Stage 1 (Dashboard Extensions) and Stage 2 (AI Advisor) features are working. Backend tests cover Services CRUD, Social Media management, Gallery limit (10), AI eligibility, AI cache (409), and WhatsApp share. Frontend tests verified ServicesManagement and SocialMediaManagement components render correctly, and AI Advisor shows correct locked/unlocked states based on booking status.

stage_1_dashboard_extensions.social_media_management: WORKING - All 8 platforms (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube, Twitter, Snapchat, WhatsApp, Website)

stage_2_ai_advisor.lock_mechanism: WORKING - Locked by default, unlocks after confirmed/completed booking
stage_2_ai_advisor.cache_mechanism: WORKING - 409 error on duplicate analysis for same booking
stage_2_ai_advisor.whatsapp_share: WORKING - Endpoint returns valid wa.me link
